zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Beauchamp於1007年出生在法國巴-諾門迪時，他的父親Hugh II de Beauchamp57歲，母親Matilda Haie42歲。他於1039年與Emiline D'Abbott結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1068年在法國諾門迪享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Beauchamp于1007年出生在法国巴-諾門迪时，他的父亲Hugh II de Beauchamp57岁，母亲Matilda Haie42岁。他于1039年与Emiline D'Abbott结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1068年在法国諾門迪享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Beauchamp was born in 1007, in Lower Normandy, France, his father, Hugh II de Beauchamp, was 57 and his mother, Matilda Haie, was 42. He married Emiline D'Abbott in 1039. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1068, in Normandy, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Beauchamp est né en 1007, à Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Hugh II de Beauchamp, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Matilda Haie, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Emiline D'Abbott en 1039. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1068, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Beauchamp 1007 in Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh II de Beauchamp 57 und seine Mutter Matilda Haie 42. Er hat 1039 Emiline D'Abbott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1068 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Beauchamp è nato il nel 1007 nel Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh II de Beauchamp, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Haie, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Emiline D'Abbott nel 1039. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1068, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Beauchampが1007年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hugh II de Beauchampは57歳，母Matilda Haieは42歳であった。1039年にEmiline D'Abbottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1068年にフランスノーマンディで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Beauchamp(이)가 1007년 프랑스 배세-노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh II de Beauchamp(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Haie(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1039년 Emiline D'Abbott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1068년 프랑스 노먼디에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Beauchamp nasceu em 1007, em Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh II de Beauchamp, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Haie, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Emiline D'Abbott em 1039. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1068, em Normandie, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Beauchamp родился в 1007 г. в местности бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh II de Beauchamp было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Haie, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Emiline D'Abbott в 1039 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1068 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Beauchamp nació en 1007, en Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh II de Beauchamp, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Matilda Haie, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Emiline D'Abbott en 1039. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1068, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
